# SCPresenterOverlayAlertSetting

**Enumeration**

Configures how to present streaming notifications to a streamer of Presenter Overlay.

## Declaration

```swift
enum SCPresenterOverlayAlertSetting
```

## Alerting Presenters

- **SCPresenterOverlayAlertSetting.always**: Always display an alert when using Presenter Overlay.
- **SCPresenterOverlayAlertSetting.never**: Never display an alert when using Presenter Overlay.
- **SCPresenterOverlayAlertSetting.system**: Displays an alert when using Presenter Overlay based on the System Settings.

## Initializers

- **init(rawValue:)**

## Notifying presenters

- **presenterOverlayPrivacyAlertSetting**: A value indicating if alerts appear to presenters while using Presenter Overlay.

## Conforms To

- BitwiseCopyable
- Equatable
- Hashable
- RawRepresentable
- Sendable
- SendableMetatype
